name: cavecrew
tagline: Decision guide for when to delegate to caveman-compressed subagents (investigator/builder/reviewer) vs. vanilla agents.
verdict: Well-built routing skill: explicit trigger phrases, a clear decision table with alternatives, concrete output-contract formats and examples, and an explicit 'what NOT to do' section. Only real gap is no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
